# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

listeners:
- name: api_gateway_listener
  address:
    socket_address: { port_value: 80 }

clusters:
- name: backend1
  connect_timeout: 1s
  type: strict_dns
  lb_policy: round_robin
  hosts:
  - socket_address: { address: 192.168.1.1, port_value: 80 }
- name: backend2
  connect_timeout: 1s
  type: strict_dns
  lb_policy: round_robin
  hosts:
  - socket_address: { address: 192.168.1.2, port_value: 80 }
- name: backend3
  connect_timeout: 1s
  type: strict_dns
  lb_policy: round_robin
  hosts:
  - socket_address: { address: 192.168.1.3, port_value: 80 }

routes:
- name: route1
  match:
    prefix: "/"
  route:
    cluster: backend1
    timeout: 1s
  tracing: {}
- name: route2
  match:
    prefix: "/api/v1"
  route:
    cluster: backend2
    timeout: 1s
  tracing: {}
- name: route3
  match:
    prefix: "/healthz"
  route:
    cluster: backend3
    timeout: 1s
  tracing: {}
